2026-04-09T06:06:23.2935526Z 
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2935944Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2941188Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2945947Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2946638Z 
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2947082Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2951055Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2951650Z 
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2951900Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2952281Z 
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2952507Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2955540Z 
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2955854Z   git switch -
2026-04-09T06:06:23.2956170Z
